markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Resolve content review bottlenecks and align on a results-driven SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Backlog:** A single-reviewer bottleneck (Jose) is delaying content. Troy will help clear the review queue to accelerate publishing and data collection.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**New SEO Focus:** The strategy shifts from broad content to targeting 5–7 high-impact keywords (e.g., "automatic speech recognition," "API keywords") to drive measurable results.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** GrowthX needs 20 new article approvals from the Airtable backlog (5 by EOD, 15 by EOW) to maintain its writing pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Programmatic SEO:** A language-specific page initiative is blocked pending a wireframe from Deepgram.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** A backlog of GrowthX-produced content awaits review by Jose.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**Process:** Jose reviews articles for grammar, tone, and SEO (keywords, H2s, internal links).](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [**Solution:** Troy will assist Jose with reviews to clear the queue and accelerate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)

### New SEO Strategy & Pipeline

  - [**Goal:** Shift from publishing volume to a results-oriented strategy focused on 5–7 high-impact keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Current organic traffic is limited to "speech-to-text API" and branded terms; the goal is to rank for broader, high-intent terms like "automatic speech recognition" and related API keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** GrowthX needs 20 new article approvals from the Airtable backlog to maintain its writing schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [**Backlog:** \~79 topics are ready for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [**Timeline:** 5 approvals by EOD, 15 by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Programmatic SEO Initiative

  - [**Project:** Create dedicated landing pages for each language Deepgram supports.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**Goal:** Drive organic traffic for language-specific speech-to-text and text-to-speech queries.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The initiative is paused, awaiting a wireframe from Deepgram to define the page template.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Troy:**](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Assist Jose with content reviews, prioritizing the "speech to text" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [Approve 20 new article topics from the Airtable backlog (5 by EOD, 15 by EOW).](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [Work with Justin on a technical SEO refresh for the Deepgram website.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Follow up with Hassan/Patricia via Slack regarding the programmatic SEO wireframe.](https://fathom.video/share/oD6xB-jhgdNW1z1-TwYwEpKTXVCNNnzz?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
